title: The Alliance Says Farewell to Wano
description: On pages 8–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9, Wano Citizens, Green Bull as Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.
scene: Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: It should be somewhere in this country....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: At least that's what the poneglyph said...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, a post-diet physique doesn't suit me, you hear?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Give it a rest, already! At my rank, I'd lose face if I let a few commanders like you get the best of me.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Navy doesn't have manpower to waste on the mess you've left us!! Not that I expected much of you bozos...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That booze wasn't anything special... you should've let it age longer.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't tell Sakurazuki-san what I'm up to, got it?! see ya.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've always dug his style, no half measures. I'm itching to get his approval.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have never had quarters admiral NYOKUGYU ( ARAMAKI)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's sure to give me an "attaboy" if I bring him this brat's head....!!

summary: This part advances the Wano Aftermath through 34 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
